attributes.additional_details: This petition aims to encourage the government and local authorities to promote renewable energy more actively. Renewable energy sources such as solar and wind power are cleaner alternatives to fossil fuels and help reduce pollution and climate change. By increasing awareness, investment, and support for renewable energy, we can protect the environment and create a healthier, more sustainable future for everyone.
attributes.background:
We, the undersigned, call on the government and local authorities to campaign more for renewable energy. Greater use of solar, wind, and other clean energy sources can reduce pollution, fight climate change, and create a healthier future for everyone.
We ask for more public awareness, focus on this

rejection.details:
We do not know what exactly you want from the Government in this policy area.  You may wish to sign any relevant petitions that are already open, such as this one:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/766520
